message:
feat(widgets): add toast animation support (bd-3tmk.3)

- ToastAnimationPhase: Entering, Visible, Exiting, Hidden
- ToastEntranceAnimation: slide from any edge, fade-in, or instant
- ToastExitAnimation: fade-out, slide-out (reverses entrance)
- ToastEasing: Linear, EaseIn/Out/InOut, Bounce easing curves
- Reduced motion support for accessibility
- Builder API for animation configuration
- 17 new tests for animation functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
